name: electron-desktop
description: Build production Electron desktop apps with a local HTTP stack, embedded Postgres, secure settings, native integrations, and signed macOS distribution.

interface.shortDescription: Build secure, native Electron desktop applications
interface.longDescription: Build and extend Electron desktop apps with Express, Vite, React Router, PGLite, Drizzle, per-launch loopback authentication, encrypted settings, native menus and windows, notifications, safe filesystem paths, and signed and notarized macOS distribution.
defaultPrompt: Build an Electron desktop app with the Trident stack.
Add a secure native capability to this Electron app.
Package and notarize this Electron app for macOS.
